refined_caption: The trash bins outside the hospital are overflowing with garbage. The surrounding area appears to be littered with waste.
complaint_description: I was appalled to see the trash bins outside the hospital overflowing with garbage. The smell was unbearable and it's a health hazard. The hospital should take immediate action to clean up the area.
voice_text: The trash cans outside the hospital are totally overflowing, it's disgusting and smells so bad.
